title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 375.236 - Certificate of authority revoked, when
text:
375.236.  Certificate of authority revoked, when. — Other provisions of law notwithstanding, the director may suspend or revoke, after a hearing, the certificate of authority or license of any insurance company including a reciprocal or interinsurance exchange for the same reasons and upon the same grounds as set forth in section 374.047.
(L. 1963 p. 485 § 375.155, A.L. 1967 p. 516, A.L. 2007 S.B. 66)
